description: Modern-world adjectives for describing everyday and technological items.
adjectives: Powered by electricity, humming with energy.
Existing in electronic form, made of ones and zeros.
Bright and reflective, catching the light.
Fresh from the factory, never used before.
Old-fashioned in a charming, collectible way.
Made from materials given a second life.
Boosted for extra speed and power.
Made to order for a specific purpose.
Previously owned, carrying someone else's history.
Built by hand with care and imperfection.
Scaled down to a fraction of normal size.
Absorbing light and releasing it in the darkness.
Customized with a name or unique design.
Rare and produced in small quantities.
Decorated by hand with careful brushwork.
Styled after a past era's look and feel.
Small enough to carry in a pocket.
Made from carved and polished timber.
